title: cynoglossum natolicum
intro: Cynoglossum natolicum, also known as the Indian forked tongue plant or snake flower, is a flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum natolicum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, bronchitis, and skin conditions. Cynoglossum natolicum can be prepared into herbal preparations like decoctions, infusions, and powders, making it a valuable plant in traditional Indian medicine.
